resources.string: Triggered after the call is screened.
In a meeting right now, will catch you later.
Can\'t talk now, will hit you up later.
Generates the auto-reply text based on the call screening result.

Send an SMS message.

Number
Checks multiple sources in order, adopts the first match found:
  Tag send_sms_to (can be created using Set Tag)
  The incoming number

SMS Content
Checks in order:
  Tag send_sms_content
  Text output from the previous step

Use this regex to exclude specific numbers, such as landlines or international numbers.

For example
  \\d{10,11}
  10 to 11-digit numbers.

Automatically send an SMS to contacts when their calls are blocked.
Different messages can be set for Meeting Mode and other blocking features.

Note
The first time the app sends an SMS, a system popup will warn you of potential charges. Tap Remember my choice to avoid this warning in the future.
Input a description to match the corresponding regex rule.
Priority is determined by the sequence of this list.

The reason why the call is allowed.

g For example, Repeated Call means the specified ringtone will play when the call is allowed by Repeated Call.
Create a new tag with the same value but a different name.

Forwards spam texts to 7726 (the universal short code spelling SPAM), a feature widely supported by many mobile carriers.

Warning
Only enable this if your carrier supports 7726. Otherwise, standard SMS charges may apply.
%s is a special character in regex (e.g. %s), escape it like %s
